name: multi-model-agents
description: AI Agent Swarm V1.5.1 refreshes the GitHub README for Custom Agents, usage flow, Lite comparison, safety boundaries, and release guidance.

interface.shortDescription: AI Agent Swarm V1.5.1: clearer GitHub README, official Custom Agents, Codex main control, Opus/Claude coding, Gemini test analysis, and RAG.
interface.longDescription: AI Agent Swarm V1.5.1 is a local Codex multi-model orchestration plugin for long-running development. Codex keeps planning, authorization, real tests, review integration, RAG writes, and final decisions. Opus/Claude performs primary coding inside authorized workspace boundaries after design plan-review. Gemini provides test strategy and failure-log analysis. This release refreshes the GitHub README around Custom Agents, Lite comparison, safety boundaries, usage flow, and release guidance.
capabilities: 本地项目记忆库（轻量 RAG）
defaultPrompt: 使用 AI Agent Swarm 处理这次代码修改，默认启用可见角色子智能体工作流。
